ai_engineer.title: AI Engineer
ai_engineer.summary: This is a full-time on-site role for an AI Engineer in Hyderabad.
responsibilities: Develop, test, and deploy machine learning models and algorithms.
Implement and maintain machine learning pipelines.
Collaborate with data scientists, software engineers, and product managers.
Identify and prioritize business problems and provide optimized solutions.
qualifications: B.E/BTech/ME/MTech in Engineering with 2-4 years of AI research experience.
Strong proficiency in Python, ML, Generative AI.
Experience with decision trees, random forests, gradient boosting, and deep learning.
Expertise in NLP, Computer Vision, LLM, TensorFlow, NumPy, OpenCV, NLTK, Pandas.
Knowledge of Generative AI, Prompt Engineering.
Strong grasp of Algorithms, Data Structures, Statistics, and Math.
Experience with software development, version control, and CI/CD.

ml_engineer.title: ML Engineer
ml_engineer.summary: This is a full-time on-site role for a Machine Learning Engineer.
responsibilities: Design and implement machine learning models and algorithms.
Build scalable ML pipelines and infrastructure.
Collaborate with data scientists and engineers to deploy ML solutions.
Optimize model performance and ensure production readiness.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Statistics, or related field.
3+ years of experience in machine learning and data science.
Proficiency in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and scikit-learn.
Experience with big data technologies (Spark, Hadoop).
Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) and MLOps.
Strong understanding of statistics, linear algebra, and calculus.

frontend_developer.title: Frontend Developer
frontend_developer.summary: This is a full-time on-site role for a Frontend Developer.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain user interfaces using React, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
Collaborate with designers and backend developers to deliver seamless user experiences.
Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability.
Ensure the technical feasibility of UI/UX designs.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field.
2+ years of experience in frontend development.
Proficiency in React, JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3.
Experience with responsive and adaptive design.
Familiarity with RESTful APIs and version control (Git).
Knowledge of modern build tools and workflows (Webpack, Babel, npm).

data_analyst.title: Data Analyst
data_analyst.summary: This is a full-time on-site role for a Data Analyst.
responsibilities: Collect, clean, and analyze large datasets to extract meaningful insights.
Create visualizations and reports to communicate findings to stakeholders.
Develop and maintain dashboards for business intelligence.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support data-driven decisions.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, or related field.
2+ years of experience in data analysis or business intelligence.
Proficiency in SQL, Python, and data visualization tools (Tableau, Power BI).
Experience with statistical analysis and hypothesis testing.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent communication and presentation abilities.

python_developer.title: Python Developer
python_developer.summary: This is a full-time on-site role for a Python Developer.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain Python applications and services.
Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code following best practices.
Collaborate with team members to design and implement new features.
Debug and fix issues in existing codebase.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field.
3+ years of experience in Python development.
Strong knowledge of Python frameworks (Django, Flask, FastAPI).
Experience with databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB).
Familiarity with version control systems (Git) and CI/CD pipelines.
Knowledge of RESTful APIs and microservices architecture.
